description: Multi-platform social media posting API. Post to Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, Pinterest, TikTok, YouTube, Threads, and Bluesky from a single API.

authentication.notes: Authentication required for all endpoints. Get your API key from https://www.post-bridge.com/

endpoints.description: Get a paginated result for media based on the applied filters

query.name: post_id
query.description: Filter by post IDs. Multiple values imply OR logic (e.g., ?post_id=123&post_id=456).

query.name: type
query.description: Filter by media types. Multiple values imply OR logic (e.g., ?type=image&type=video).

endpoints.javascript_example:
const response = await fetch('https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/media?offset=0&limit=10', { method: 'GET', headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' } });
const data = await response.json();

endpoints.description: Retrieve a specific media item by its ID
endpoints.javascript_example:
const response = await fetch('https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/media/MEDIA_ID', { method: 'GET', headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' } });
const media = await response.json();

endpoints.description: Delete a specific media item. Note: Media is automatically deleted after 24h if not attached to a post, or when the post is published.
endpoints.javascript_example:
const response = await fetch('https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/media/MEDIA_ID', { method: 'DELETE', headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' } });
const result = await response.json();

endpoints.description: Create a signed upload URL for media. Returns media_id and upload_url. Upload your file to the upload_url via PUT request, then use media_id in posts.

response.200: Signed upload URL created successfully. Returns media_id and upload_url.

endpoints.workflow:
1. POST to /v1/media/create-upload-url with file details → get media_id and upload_url
2. PUT file to upload_url with matching Content-Type
3. Use media_id in post creation

endpoints.description: Get a paginated result for posts based on the applied filters

query.name: platform
query.description: Filter by platforms. Multiple values imply OR logic.

query.name: status
query.description: Filter by post status. Multiple values imply OR logic.

endpoints.javascript_example:
const response = await fetch('https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/posts?status=scheduled', { method: 'GET', headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' } });
const posts = await response.json();

endpoints.description: Create a new post to be published across multiple social media platforms. Supports platform-specific and account-specific overrides.

social_accounts.description: Array of social account IDs for posting

scheduled_at.description: Scheduled date and time for the post. Setting to null will post instantly.

media_urls.description: Array of publicly accessible media URLs (ignored if media is provided)

platform_configurations.description: Platform-specific overrides for caption, media, and platform-specific fields

account_configurations.description: Account-specific overrides for individual social accounts

is_draft.description: If true, post won't process until updated

processing_enabled.description: If true, will process video files to ensure they post

endpoints.description: Retrieve a specific post by its ID
endpoints.javascript_example:
const response = await fetch('https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/posts/POST_ID', { method: 'GET', headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' } });
const post = await response.json();

endpoints.description: Update an existing post. IMPORTANT: If updating a 'scheduled' post, always pass 'scheduled_at' otherwise the post will process immediately.
endpoints.body_schema: Same as Create Post, all fields optional
endpoints.curl_example: curl -X PATCH 'https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/posts/POST_ID' -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"caption":"Updated caption"}'

endpoints.javascript_example:
const response = await fetch('https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/posts/POST_ID', { method: 'DELETE', headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' } });
const result = await response.json();

endpoints.description: Get a paginated result for social accounts. IMPORTANT: Get these IDs once and reuse them - they don't change.

query.name: platform
query.description: Filter by platform(s). Multiple values imply OR logic.

query.name: username
query.description: Filter by username(s). Multiple values imply OR logic.

response.200: Paginated data set for social accounts

endpoints.description: Retrieve a specific social account by its ID
endpoints.javascript_example:
const response = await fetch('https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/social-accounts/123', { method: 'GET', headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' } });
const account = await response.json();

endpoints.description: Get paginated results showing the outcome of published posts (success/failure, errors, platform URLs)

query.name: post_id
query.description: Filter by post IDs. Multiple values imply OR logic.

query.name: platform
query.description: Filter by platform(s). Multiple values imply OR logic.

response.200: Paginated data set for post results

endpoints.javascript_example:
const response = await fetch('https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/post-results?post_id=POST_ID', { method: 'GET', headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' } });
const results = await response.json();

endpoints.description: Retrieve a specific post result by its ID
endpoints.javascript_example:
const response = await fetch('https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/post-results/RESULT_ID', { method: 'GET', headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' } });
const result = await response.json();

pinterest.notes: Requires board_ids. Supports link field for destination URL.

instagram.notes: Trial reels require: Professional/Creator account, 1000+ followers, public profile. Max 5 trial reels/day.

tiktok.notes: draft=true saves as draft instead of publishing. is_aigc=true labels as AI-generated.

facebook.notes: Supports placement field for post location.

typical_workflow.description: Standard flow for creating a post with media

steps.notes: Do this once, save the IDs. They don't change.
Direct upload to storage, not to Post Bridge API
Use media_id and social_account IDs from previous steps
Verify post succeeded on all platforms

edge_cases.media_deletion: Media auto-deletes after 24h if not attached to a post, or when post is published
edge_cases.scheduled_updates: When updating a scheduled post, ALWAYS include scheduled_at or it will post immediately
edge_cases.platform_limits: Instagram trial reels: Professional/Creator account, 1000+ followers, public profile required. Max 5/day.
edge_cases.video_processing: Set processing_enabled=false to skip video processing if needed

response_meta.next: URL to next page of results, or null if none
